_meta.description: slick carousel - jQuery responsive carousel plugin by Ken Wheeler
_meta.note: Single major version line (1.x). Last release v1.8.1 (2017). Unmaintained.

js_banner.format: ASCII art block comment followed by Version: X.Y.Z
js_banner.note: Banner present in unminified slick.js only. slick.min.js strips it.

slick-theme.css.description: Optional theme with @font-face for slick icon font.

webfonts.description: Custom icon font for prev/next arrows.
